personas.label: Builder
personas.headline: Get first success by running the core lifecycle with explicit evidence output.

steps.title: Initialize and inspect journey
steps.outcome: Creates a starter manifest and prints the next best action.
steps.command: pnpm tsx src/cli.ts init && pnpm tsx src/cli.ts journey

steps.title: Run unified pipeline
steps.outcome: Executes update, scan, and apply with a single JSON summary.

steps.title: Verify local quality gate
steps.outcome: Confirms lint, typecheck, tests, build, and quality evidence checks.

personas.label: Reviewer
personas.headline: Validate trust posture quickly with policy, evidence, and release readiness artifacts.

steps.title: Review policy outcomes
steps.outcome: Shows pass/fail findings with explicit reasoning.

steps.title: Request explainability
steps.outcome: Outputs trust and policy rationale for each decision.

steps.title: Inspect release gate
steps.outcome: Verifies full release criteria with deterministic local evidence.

personas.label: Operator
personas.headline: Keep production-grade delivery healthy with predictable checks and recovery playbooks.

steps.title: Collect environment diagnostics
steps.outcome: Generates a full doctor report for release readiness triage.

steps.title: Verify evidence integrity
steps.outcome: Confirms scorecards, reports, and quality artifacts are current.

steps.title: Generate safe remediation plan
steps.outcome: Produces a non-destructive fix plan for policy or lifecycle failures.
